prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content:
Headline: Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adapts to how you work.

Your day isn’t one-size-fits-all, and your lighting shouldn’t be either. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and the light in your room—so you stay focused in the morning and unwind in the evening without lifting a finger.

It’s the warm, modern light that keeps your eyes comfortable and your space inviting. Just set it on your desk, connect once, and enjoy lighting that simply works.

Designed for remote workers who balance deep work, video calls, and everything in between, Lumina makes every hour feel just right.

Email 1: Launch Announcement
Subject: Meet Lumina—light that adapts to your day

Hi there,

Today we’re launching Lumina, the smart desk lamp built for how you actually work. It adjusts brightness and color temperature automatically based on the time of day, your calendar events, and the light in your room.

That means brighter, cooler light for focus in the morning, softer, warmer light in the evening, and perfect settings for video calls—without you touching a button.

Lumina is available now for $149. Get ready for a more comfortable, productive workday.

→ Shop Lumina

Email 2: Benefits + Social Proof
Subject: No more eye strain, no more adjustments

Hi there,

Remote work shouldn’t mean squinting at your screen or fiddling with lamp settings all day. Lumina takes care of it for you.

• Adapts to your calendar: brighter for deep work, softer for wind-down
• Responds to ambient light: always the right level, even as daylight shifts
• Designed to reduce eye strain and keep you feeling energized

Early users love the “set it and forget it” experience—and how effortless their workspace feels.

Ready to upgrade your desk?

→ Get Lumina for $149

Email 3: Last Chance / Reminder
Subject: Your desk upgrade is waiting

Hi there,

A quick reminder: Lumina is now available, and it’s built for remote workers who want lighting that just works.

If you’re tired of manual adjustments or harsh light, this is your moment. Lumina learns your routine and keeps your workspace comfortable all day.

Order today for $149 and see the difference smart lighting makes.

→ Buy Lumina

P.S. Great lighting is one of the easiest productivity wins—Lumina makes it effortless.

Twitter/X
1) Meet Lumina—the smart desk lamp that adjusts to your day. Time of day, calendar events, ambient light… it all just works. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) No more eye strain. No more manual adjustments. Lumina keeps your workspace comfortable from morning focus to evening wind-down. ✨

Instagram
1) A desk upgrade that learns your routine. Lumina automatically adapts brightness and warmth for focus, calls, and wind-down. Light that just works. $149
2) Morning focus. Afternoon calls. Evening calm. Lumina keeps your lighting in sync with your day. 💡 #workfromhome #wellness

LinkedIn
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp built for remote work. It adjusts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—so your workspace stays comfortable and productive. Available now for $149.
2) Great work starts with great lighting. Lumina reduces eye strain and eliminates manual adjustments, giving remote teams a better way to work from home. Learn more today.

HERO
Headline: Lumina—light that adapts to your life
Subheadline: A smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient light.
CTA: Get Lumina for $149

FEATURES
1) Automatic circadian tuning
Lumina shifts from bright, cool light in the morning to warm, relaxing tones at night—so you stay focused and feel better, all day long.

2) Calendar-aware lighting
Deep work? Video call? Wind-down? Lumina reads your schedule and sets the right lighting before each moment begins.

3) Ambient light sensing
As daylight changes, Lumina keeps your workspace perfectly balanced without you lifting a finger.

4) Eye-comfort design
Flicker-free, glare-minimized lighting reduces eye strain during long work sessions.

5) Effortless setup
Connect once, set your preferences, and let Lumina do the rest.

TESTIMONIALS (Placeholder)
“[Customer Quote Here]” — Name, Title
“[Customer Quote Here]” — Name, Title
“[Customer Quote Here]” — Name, Title

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know my schedule?
Lumina syncs with your calendar (Google, Outlook, and Apple Calendar) to anticipate the lighting you need.

2) Can I manually control the light?
Yes. Use the app or the lamp’s touch controls anytime you want to override or fine-tune settings.

3) Does it work without Wi‑Fi?
Yes. Your last-used settings are saved locally, and the lamp continues to adjust based on time of day and ambient light.

4) Is Lumina compatible with smart home systems?
Lumina integrates with major platforms including Google Home and Amazon Alexa.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, and a quick-start guide.

6) What is the return policy?
We offer a 30-day, no-questions-asked return policy.

CTA (Bottom)
Ready for light that just works?
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Automatically Adapts to Your Workday

SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month Day, Year] — Today, Lumina announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp designed for remote workers. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting, delivering a comfortable, productive workspace without manual adjustments.

As remote work becomes a long-term reality, lighting has emerged as a critical factor in productivity and wellness. Lumina addresses this need with a modern, warm design and intelligent automation that “just works.” The lamp transitions from cool, focused light in the morning to warm, relaxing tones in the evening, reducing eye strain and helping users stay energized throughout the day.

“Remote workers shouldn’t have to think about their lighting,” said [Founder Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina to learn your routine and deliver the perfect light at every moment—whether you’re starting a deep work session or winding down after a long day.”

Lumina integrates with popular calendars and responds to ambient light to maintain a balanced workspace. The lamp is now available for $149 at [website URL].

For more information, visit [website URL] or contact press@lumina.com.

About Lumina
Lumina creates smart lighting designed for how you actually work. With a focus on modern design, wellness, and effortless automation, Lumina helps remote workers build spaces that feel comfortable, productive, and ready for anything.

Press Contact
Name: [Press Contact Name]
Email: press@lumina.com
Phone: [Phone Number]

All deliverables have been created and saved to their respective files:

- `tagline.txt`
- `hero-copy.txt`
- `email-sequence.txt`
- `social-posts.txt`
- `landing-page.txt`
- `press-release.txt`

Let me know if you want any refinements or additional assets.
